title: An automated serialization option is needed for ticket making
excerpt: We have been using Monday for development but were thinking about using it for our trouble ticketing system. As it stands I’ve previously used Slack and SNOW and they both have a ticket numbering system. I’d this idea to…

posts.author: Josh.barr (Josh Barr)
posts.cookedHtml: We have been using Monday for development but were thinking about using it for our trouble ticketing system. As it stands I’ve previously used Slack and SNOW and they both have a ticket numbering system. I’d this idea to be implemented to Monday. If a copy ticket number/ copy url to ticket page option could also come stock with it, that’d be insane as well.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Josh.barr

Have you checked out the monday.com dev product?

That aside, you may find the Auto ID app useful - it will allow you to dictate format, prefix and sequential/random unique IDs for just your situation.
There’s a native ID column in monday.com but digits only, non-sequential and can’t be controlled.

Let me know your thoughts!

peta@upstreamtech.io
upstream

posts.author: Josh.barr (Josh Barr)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ll check it out thanks for the quick reply man

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
A pleasure @Josh.barr

Have a great afternoon ahead mate!
